headline: IBM Doubles Down On AI And Quantum As Valuation Gap Persists
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) has launched IBM Sovereign Core, a software platform aimed at helping enterprises and public sector entities run AI workloads with tighter control over data and compliance. The company, together with Cleveland Clinic and RIKEN, reported a quantum computing milestone by simulating the largest biologically meaningful molecule yet on IBM quantum hardware using new hybrid algorithms. IBM also announced an intended collaboration with Aramco focused on applying AI, automation, and...
